languages.text: {n}Прежде чем ответить, Яруб озирается по сторонам, словно проверяя, нет ли кругом лишних ушей. Его голос понижается почти до шепота.{/n} "Капитан Изимонд Зауэрбэк — единственный, кого я знаю. Говорят, что плазменный пистолет ему вручил лично {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} за верную службу династии. Пистолет, понятное дело, дорогой, с надписью именной. Нашему брату таких не полагается, да и простым блюстителям тоже. Эх, мне бы такую награду — живо бы нашел ей применение. Глядишь, и дела бы свои поправил".

traits.locale_text: {n}Прежде чем ответить, Яруб озирается по сторонам, словно проверяя, нет ли кругом лишних ушей. Его голос понижается почти до шепота.{/n} "Капитан Изимонд Зауэрбэк — единственный, кого я знаю. Говорят, что плазменный пистолет ему вручил лично {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g} за верную службу династии. Пистолет, понятное дело, дорогой, с надписью именной. Нашему брату таких не полагается, да и простым блюстителям тоже. Эх, мне бы такую награду — живо бы нашел ей применение. Глядишь, и дела бы свои поправил".

languages.text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

languages.text: {n}雅鲁布回答前先环顾了一下四周，像是在确认附近没人在偷听。他的声音压得极低，几乎成了耳语：{/n}“我只知道伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克上尉有一把。听说那把等离子手枪是{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}亲自赐给他的，以表彰他对王朝的忠心效力。可想而知，那可是把值钱的家伙，上面还刻着他名字的首字母什么的。那种枪可不是给我这种人用的，普通的执法者也不配。要是我得了那种赏赐，肯定会物尽其用，说不定就能出人头地了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

traits.locale_text: {n}雅鲁布回答前先环顾了一下四周，像是在确认附近没人在偷听。他的声音压得极低，几乎成了耳语：{/n}“我只知道伊西蒙德·苏尔贝克上尉有一把。听说那把等离子手枪是{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}亲自赐给他的，以表彰他对王朝的忠心效力。可想而知，那可是把值钱的家伙，上面还刻着他名字的首字母什么的。那种枪可不是给我这种人用的，普通的执法者也不配。要是我得了那种赏赐，肯定会物尽其用，说不定就能出人头地了。”

languages.text: {n}Jarub regarde autour de lui avant de répondre, comme s'il voulait s'assurer qu'il n'y a pas d'oreilles indiscrètes dans les parages, puis il murmure :{/n} « Seulement le capitaine Isimond Sauerback, à ma connaissance. Il paraît que c'est le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} lui-même qui lui a offert son pistolet à plasma pour le remercier de ses loyaux services envers la dynastie. C'est une arme coûteuse, comme vous pouvez l'imaginer ; ils ont même gravé ses initiales dessus. Pas le genre de chose qu'on donnerait à un soldat comme moi ni même à un prévôt ordinaire. Mais si, par miracle, je recevais un jour une récompense pareille, je peux vous assurer que j'en ferais bon usage. J'aurais peut-être plus de chances de m'en tirer avec ça. »
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub regarde autour de lui avant de répondre, comme s'il voulait s'assurer qu'il n'y a pas d'oreilles indiscrètes dans les parages, puis il murmure :{/n} « Seulement le capitaine Isimond Sauerback, à ma connaissance. Il paraît que c'est le {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} lui-même qui lui a offert son pistolet à plasma pour le remercier de ses loyaux services envers la dynastie. C'est une arme coûteuse, comme vous pouvez l'imaginer ; ils ont même gravé ses initiales dessus. Pas le genre de chose qu'on donnerait à un soldat comme moi ni même à un prévôt ordinaire. Mais si, par miracle, je recevais un jour une récompense pareille, je peux vous assurer que j'en ferais bon usage. J'aurais peut-être plus de chances de m'en tirer avec ça. »

languages.text: {n}Jarub, cevap vermeden önce etrafına bakınıyor. Sanki yakınlarda dinleyen kulaklar olup olmadığını kontrol ediyor. Sesi neredeyse fısıltıya dönüşüyor.{/n} "Bildiğim tek kişi, Yüzbaşı İsimond Sauerback. Plazma tabancasının kendisine hanedanlığa olan sadık hizmetlerinden dolayı bizzat {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} tarafından verildiğini duydum. Tahmin edilebileceği üzere bu pahalı bir parça, üzerine baş harfleri ve daha birçok şey kazınmış. Öyle silahlar benim gibi insanlara ya da sıradan infazcılara göre değildir. Bana öyle bir ödül verilseydi onu iyi bir şekilde kullanırdım. Belki kaderimi bile değiştirebilirdim."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

Bana öyle bir ödül verilseydi onu iyi bir şekilde kullanırdım. Belki kaderimi bile değiştirebilirdim."

languages.text: {n}Jarub mira alrededor antes de responder, como si comprobara si hay algún oído indiscreto cerca. Su voz se convierte en un susurro:{/n} «El capitán Isimond Sauerback es el único que conozco. He oído que el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} le entregó personalmente el rifle de plasma por su servicio a la dinastía. Como se imagina, es un modelo caro, con sus insignias grabadas y todo. Las armas así no son para la chusma como yo ni para los guardias corrientes. Si me dieran a mí una recompensa como esa, le aseguro que la usaría tanto como fuera posible. Mejoraría un poco mi situación, si entiende lo que quiero decir».
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. I heard the plasma pistol was given to him personally by the {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g} for his loyal service to the dynasty. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

traits.locale_text: {n}Jarub mira alrededor antes de responder, como si comprobara si hay algún oído indiscreto cerca. Su voz se convierte en un susurro:{/n} «El capitán Isimond Sauerback es el único que conozco. He oído que el {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g} le entregó personalmente el rifle de plasma por su servicio a la dinastía. Como se imagina, es un modelo caro, con sus insignias grabadas y todo. Las armas así no son para la chusma como yo ni para los guardias corrientes. Si me dieran a mí una recompensa como esa, le aseguro que la usaría tanto como fuera posible. Mejoraría un poco mi situación, si entiende lo que quiero decir».

languages.text: {n}Jarub sieht sich um, ehe er antwortet, als würde er sich versichern, dass keine neugierigen Ohren in der Nähe sind. Seine Stimme gleicht nun einem Flüstern:{/n} "Meines Wissens nur Captain Isimond Sauerback. Ich habe gehört, der {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g} hat ihm die Plasmapistole für seine treuen Dienste für die Dynastie persönlich überreicht. Wie Ihr Euch denken könnt, ein teures Stück, mit seinen Initialen und so. Derartige Waffen sind nichts für meinesgleichen oder gewöhnliche Enforcer. Bekäme ich eine derartige Belohnung, würde ich sie gewiss gut einsetzen. Vielleicht würde sie mein Schicksal verbessern."
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. His voice drops to almost a whisper:{/n} "Captain Isimond Sauerback is the only one I know of. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."

Bekäme ich eine derartige Belohnung, würde ich sie gewiss gut einsetzen. Vielleicht würde sie mein Schicksal verbessern."

languages.text: {n}ジャラブは答える前に周囲を見回し、近所に耳を傾けている者がいないかを確認しているかのようだった。彼の声はほとんどささやき声にまで下がった。{/n}「イシモンド・ザウアーバック船長は私が知っている唯一の人です。そのプラズマピストルは、その忠誠心からダイナスティに仕える彼に、{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグトレーダー{/g}が個人的に贈ったものだと聞きました。想像に難しくありませんが、それは高価なもので、彼のイニシャルが刻まれています。そのような銃は、私のような者や、普通の執行官にはふさわしくありません。もし私がそのような報酬を受け取っていたならば、きっとうまく活用していたでしょう。私の境遇はきっと改善されていたでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}Jarub looks around before he answers, as if checking whether there are any listening ears nearby. As you can imagine, it's an expensive piece, engraved with his initials and all. Guns like that aren't for the likes of me, or ordinary enforcers either. If I'd been given a reward like that, you can be sure I'd put it to good use. I just might improve my lot."
